title: 貴方の夢を受け継いで

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While training for the Satsuki Sho, we uncover
one of Mejiro Bright's weaknesses. She needs to
learn how to control a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We reach out to Mejiro Ryan for advice, and she
comes to help coach Mejiro Bright, using her own
experience as a touchstone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ryan experienced similar struggles herself, so she
wants Mejiro Bright to be able to run without any
regret. Mejiro Bright takes this to heart as she
prepares for the Triple Crown.
